data.title: Polymarket Predicts Orlando Magic's Playoff Chances Drop
data.description:
The probability of the Orlando Magic advancing to the NBA playoffs has decreased to 39% on Polymarket, marking a 30% decline over the past 24 hours. According to Odaily, the Magic recently lost to the Philadelphia 76ers with a score of 97-109 and are set to compete against the Charlotte Hornets for the final Eastern Conference playoff spot.

In related news, Charlotte Hornets star LaMelo Ball was fined $35,000 for pulling Bam Adebayo during a game against the Miami Heat, resulting in a flagrant foul penalty two. However, he was not suspended. Additionally, Ball received a $25,000 fine for using profanity during a post-game interview, bringing his total fines to $60,000.

data.title: Hornets star Lonzo Ball was not suspended, and the probability of the Magic advancing to the NBA playoffs on Polymarket dropped to 39%, a 30% decrease over 24 hours.
data.description:
According to Odaily Seer, the probability of the Orlando Magic making the NBA playoffs on Polymarket has dropped to 39%, and by 30% in the last 24 hours.

Yesterday, the Magic lost to the 76ers 97-109 and will face the Hornets at 7:30 AM tomorrow for the final playoff spot in the Eastern Conference. Additionally, Hornets star LaMelo Ball was fined $35,000 and given a flagrant foul 2 for pulling Bam Adebayo during the game against the Heat, but was not suspended. Ball was also fined $25,000 for using profanity in a post-game interview, bringing his total fines to $60,000. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Stripe and Paradigm Launch Privacy Feature for Enterprise Blockchain Applications
data.description:
On April 17, Stripe and Paradigm unveiled a new privacy feature called Zones for their Layer 1 blockchain, Tempo. According to BlockBeats, this solution is designed for enterprise-level applications requiring enhanced confidentiality, such as payroll, fund management, and payment settlements.

Zones operate as parallel blockchains connected to the Tempo mainnet, offering private execution environments where internal transactions remain confidential. However, assets and funds are fully interoperable with Tempo L1, other Zones, deposit channels, and liquidity pools. Each Zone is managed by trusted entities like financial institutions or infrastructure providers, who can monitor all activities within their environment and enforce access controls, while not controlling the underlying assets.

data.title: KieDex Secures $3.5 Million in Funding to Develop Crypto Futures Platform
data.description: KieDex, a cryptocurrency futures exchange, has announced the completion of a $3.5 million funding round led by Marqel Capital. According to ChainCatcher, the funds will be used to develop the KieDex platform, aiming to create a new generation of crypto futures exchange focused on providing a fast, secure, and incentive-driven trading experience.

data.title: Palm Oil Production Season Faces Demand Plunge Amid Biodiesel Policy Expectations
data.description: Palm oil production is currently experiencing a significant increase, coinciding with a sharp decline in demand. According to Jin10, this situation has led to a stalemate in prices, as the market anticipates potential support from biodiesel policies. The ongoing dynamics suggest an impending decision point for the direction of palm oil prices.

data.title: Schwab Considers Launching Prediction Markets Amid CEO's Remarks
data.description:
On April 17, Schwab is exploring the potential of prediction markets, according to BlockBeats. The company's President and CEO, Rick Wurster, highlighted the distinction between betting on Taylor Swift's personal life and wagering on the latest inflation data.

Wurster stated during the company's first-quarter earnings call on Thursday that Schwab might eventually introduce prediction markets. He emphasized the importance of differentiating financial event bets from topics like sports, politics, and pop culture.

However, Wurster clarified that Schwab is not among the companies rushing to market products related to this field. "It's not at the top of our clients' demand list, and if you look at trader success rate data, it's not high; people usually lose money. This is certainly something we will study seriously, and it would be quite straightforward for us to offer. When we do, we will make it more formal," he explained.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda Declines Comment on April Rate Hike Expectations
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda has chosen not to comment on market expectations regarding a potential interest rate hike in April. According to Jin10, when asked about the declining anticipation for an April rate increase, Ueda refrained from providing any remarks. This comes amid ongoing speculation about the central bank's future monetary policy moves.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda: Slowing Growth to Pressure Inflation
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda has indicated that a slowdown in economic growth is expected to exert pressure on inflation. According to Jin10, Ueda's comments highlight concerns about the potential impact of reduced economic activity on the country's inflation rates. The Bank of Japan has been closely monitoring economic indicators to assess the implications for its monetary policy. Ueda's remarks suggest that the central bank may need to consider adjustments to its current strategies if growth continues to decelerate, potentially affecting inflation targets.

data.title: SenseTime Announces Share Placement Agreement to Raise HK$32.47 Billion
data.description: SenseTime (00020.HK) announced on April 17, 2026, that it has entered into a placement agreement with placement agents as of April 16, 2026. According to Jin10, the placement agents have conditionally agreed to facilitate the subscription of 1.7 billion placement shares by no fewer than six subscribers at a price of HK$1.91 per share, representing an approximate 8.6% discount from the latest closing price. The total proceeds from the placement are expected to be approximately HK$32.47 billion, with net proceeds estimated at HK$32.3 billion. The placement will provide SenseTime with additional financial resources to continue investing in its fields of interest and support the group's general working capital needs.

data.title: Stablecoin Interest Compromise Draft Delayed in CLARITY Act
data.description: Republican Senator Thom Tillis announced that the anticipated compromise draft concerning stablecoin interest within the CLARITY Act will not be released this week. According to NS3.AI, the delay is attributed to the need for clarity on the bill's markup schedule before proceeding with the draft's release.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | SPDR Gold Trust Holdings Increase by 1.143 Tons
data.description: The SPDR Gold Trust, the world's largest gold exchange-traded fund (ETF), reported an increase in its holdings by 1.143 tons. According to Jin10, the current total holdings now stand at 1,052.906 tons. This change reflects ongoing adjustments in the gold market as investors continue to monitor global economic conditions and market trends.

data.title: Hedge Funds Recover Amid US-Iran Ceasefire Optimism
data.description: Hedge funds experienced a robust recovery in early April, rebounding from losses incurred in the previous month. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran has sparked optimism among investors, suggesting a potential resolution to the ongoing conflict. This development has positively impacted market sentiment, contributing to the improved performance of hedge funds during this period.

data.title: Sui's USDsui Stablecoin Now Available Across Ecosystem
data.description: Sui has announced that its native stablecoin, USDsui, is now accessible for widespread use within the Sui ecosystem. According to NS3.AI, developers can incorporate USDsui into various applications, including wallets, trading protocols, and lending markets. The official launch of USDsui was previously announced by Sui on March 4.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin in 'No-Trade Zone' Amid AI Disruption and Iran Conflict
data.description: Arthur Hayes has described Bitcoin as being in a "no-trade zone" at approximately $75,000. According to NS3.AI, Hayes attributes this stance to the ongoing AI disruption and the conflict in Iran, which are contributing to an uncertain market outlook. He further stated that he is refraining from deploying new capital until the Federal Reserve takes action to inject liquidity into the economy.

data.title: CFTC Chair Vows Strict Enforcement Against Fraud in Prediction Markets
data.description: CFTC Chair Michael Selig has assured House lawmakers that the agency will employ "the full force of the law" to combat fraud and insider trading in prediction markets. According to NS3.AI, this statement comes amid increased scrutiny following approximately $500 million in oil and equities futures trades on March 23. Selig highlighted that the CFTC has issued an advance notice of proposed rulemaking to establish clearer standards for event contracts. He also emphasized that the agency retains the authority to reject self-certified listings. Despite being the sole commissioner, Selig affirmed that he will not halt rulemaking activities.

data.title: Fed Rate Decision: High Probability of No Change in April, CME Reports
data.description: The CME's FedWatch tool indicates a 99.5% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in April, with only a 0.5% chance of a 25 basis point hike. According to Jin10, the likelihood of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut by June stands at 1.4%, while the probability of rates remaining unchanged is 98%. Additionally, there is a 0.5% chance of a cumulative 25 basis point increase by June.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 75,000 USDT with a 0.33% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 16, 2026, 21:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 75,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 75,000.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 0.33% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Yuga Labs Appoints New CEO to Drive Metaverse Growth
data.description: Yuga Labs has announced the appointment of Michael Figge as its new chief executive officer, while Greg Solano transitions to the role of chairman after serving as CEO for approximately two years. According to NS3.AI, Figge has been in the CEO position for several weeks and intends to concentrate on expanding Otherside, Yuga Labs' metaverse initiative.

data.title: SpaceX Accelerates Employee Stock Vesting Amid IPO Preparations
data.description: SpaceX has reportedly moved up the vesting date for employee stock options to as early as next week, according to sources familiar with the matter. According to Jin10, this decision comes as the company prepares for an initial public offering (IPO) with a target valuation exceeding $2 trillion. Employees were informed that the vesting date for options, which allows them to sell their shares, has been advanced from the expected May date to April. Sources indicate that this accelerated vesting is expected to alleviate employee concerns regarding the number of shares available for sale at the time of the IPO. Typically, companies disclose the number of shares available for sale and the stock options granted to employees in their IPO filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The sources noted that discussions are still ongoing, and details of the IPO, including the timeline, may still change.

data.title: Kalshi Appeals Nevada's Ban on Event Contracts in Ninth Circuit Court
data.description: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit recently heard oral arguments regarding Kalshi's appeal against Nevada's prohibition on certain event contracts. According to NS3.AI, Kalshi contended that these contracts should be classified as swaps under the jurisdiction of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), rather than being subject to state gaming laws. The court has yet to issue a decision on the matter.
